commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the doctor cron repair path to warn and return when the cron store cannot be loaded, and adds a regression test for an unreadable cron store.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +16. Total +29 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, though I did not run a live reproduction in this read-only review. Current main routes doctor cron health through `maybeRepairLegacyCronStore`, which awaits strict `loadCronStore` behavior that rethrows non-ENOENT read failures.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed to supply real after-fix doctor behavior proof; there is no narrow automated code repair from this review.
